message:
fix(mvcc,pager,vdbe): filter agreeing pages from sheaf obstructions, zero freelist trunk pages, and fix coroutine test

**MVCC Sheaf Conformal Analysis (sheaf_conformal.rs)**
- Fixed false-positive sheaf obstructions: overlapping pages where both
  transactions agree on the version are no longer reported as obstructions
- `check_sheaf_consistency()`: uses version_order function to test agreement
  when available, falls back to equality check otherwise
- `check_sheaf_consistency_with_chains()`: same fix for chain-based analysis
- `OpportunityScore::score()`: clamp effort to f64::EPSILON minimum to prevent
  INFINITY scores (which would always pass the gate) when effort is zero/negative

**Pager Freelist Serialization (pager.rs)**
- Zero entire freelist trunk page buffer before writing to prevent leaking
  stale data from the page pool in the unused tail of trunk pages

**VDBE Codegen (codegen.rs)**
- Removed redundant Literal/Placeholder match arm in emit_upsert_expr (now
  handled by wildcard arm, avoiding dead code)
- Fixed INSERT test assertions: InsertSource::Values now provides correct
  number of placeholder values matching table column count

**VDBE Engine — Coroutine test rewrite (engine.rs)**
- Rewrote InitCoroutine/Yield test to use correct producer-consumer structure:
  consumer emits Yield+ResultRow pairs, producer emits Integer+Yield pairs
- Uses `op_at_mut()` to patch InitCoroutine p2/p3 after both sections are
  emitted, avoiding forward-reference label resolution issues

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
